title: RDP Load Balance and Redirection Server
author: DaveSchopp
body_snippet:
## Expected Behavior
Expect the ability to specify the information in the Config that's found in .RDP files, specifically the alternate address, redirection server, workspace ID name, and load balance info, then connect successfully.

## Current Behavior
I can enter the load balance info, not the other information. Connection to the server fails.  A connection window appears and closes immediately.

## Context
I’m trying to connect to a local server that has the following lines in the .RD...

iterations.description: Issue has no body describing the actual problem, and the only comments indicate a request for more details and a test on the latest build with no confirmation received.
Wontfix: RDP load balancing properties depend on MSTSCLib version and server-side configuration

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: could you send example file (remove any of yours data just keep examples) will try to check (send to support@mremoteng.org)

comments.author: DaveSchopp
comments.snippet: Email with examples has been sent to your email address as requested.

notes: Feature: RDP Load Balance Info and Redirection Server fields. Niche RDP feature.
